anchor.note: local sprite-space origin point (bottom, dense end); engine positions this at an ashtray/cigarette anchor. One of 3 asynchronous loop frames — see 02/03.

review_notes: Layer: atmosphere. Sparse stochastic dither (soot_4 core / soot_3 edge, ~55% density at base thinning to ~5% at the top) faking low alpha — SpriteCanvas has no partial-alpha, so opacity is approximated by pixel coverage per ART_BIBLE §7 ('smoke is an animated overlay ... keep it subtle, should not erase faces'). Lazy S-curl rise, ~3.5px lateral drift, dissipates upward. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 8x — reads as a thin drifting wisp, not a solid cloud.
